title: Glass Normals
description: A resource pack with high resolution glass normals to use with shaders
body:
A simple resource pack with high resolution (1024x) to use with shaders that support refraction effects.

![A sample of how the pack looks with a pathtracing shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a46dcd8e15032d5c6e53294f521c4e4dc969be2.webp)
